title: Add board name to notifications when mentioned
excerpt: Can you add the board name at the bottom of notifications when someone mentions a team member?  When I get automated notifications, the board name is at the bottom.  But for @ mentions, there is no board name and I have …

posts.author: awright (Amanda)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can you add the board name at the bottom of notifications when someone mentions a team member? When I get automated notifications, the board name is at the bottom. But for @ mentions, there is no board name and I have to click the notification to go to the board. See attached.

Screenshot 2022-09-22 100520750×661 57.1 KB
